g.aria-label: Gradient legend titled 'Count of Records' for fill color with values from 1 to 846
X-axis titled 'Year' for a discrete scale with 23 values: 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, ending with 2022
Y-axis titled 'zip' for a discrete scale with 38 values: 2445, 2214, 2126, 2134, 2446, ending with 2116
